body.p: Start hive shell command line window, execute the following command to create the data table.
body.codeblock:
hive> create external table sdb_tab(id INT, name STRING, value DOUBLE) stored by "com.sequoiadb.hive.SdbHiveStorageHandler" tblproperties("sdb.address" = "localhost:11810";)
OK Time taken: 0.386 seconds
body.p: Sdb.address SequoiaDB coord node is used to specify the IP and port, if there are multiple coord node, you can write to multiple, separated by commas. 表的数据库对应SequoiaDB的集合空间,表对应集合空间中的集合.
